title: add workaround for gstreamer 1.25.0 to 1.26.2
body:
see-also: https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gstreamer/-/commit/bbf60305ed2ee35f4ecf7a5de2bb139203dda2af

Explore the source code to identify the files and functions to modify.

step_plan.summary: Add a dedicated GStreamer compatibility helper and route the existing version check through it to implement a targeted workaround for GStreamer 1.25.x–1.26.2, while keeping the minimum version guard intact.

steps.reason: Introduce a small, testable helper that encapsulates GST version compatibility logic and the known workaround for GStreamer 1.25.0–1.26.2. This isolates the workaround from the core version guard and enables independent testing and maintenance.
steps.side_effects: Adds a new public helper used by the version check; requires unit tests to cover new logic; may require minor import adjustments and documentation within the module

steps.operation: Refactor GST version check to use the new helper
steps.reason: Replace the hard-coded version comparison with a call to check_gst_compatibility so the workaround path is explicit and testable, while preserving the existing minimum-version enforcement.
steps.side_effects: If the wrapper signature or call sites change, downstream imports/tests may require updates; ensures the workaround path is triggered only for 1.25.0–1.26.2 and logs a warning when active; potential need to add/adjust tests to mock Gst.version()
